access_denied: Access was denied. The request was blocked by fraud protection or administrator policy.
expired_token: The continuation token has expired. Please restart the authentication flow.
http_request_failed: The HTTP request to the authentication server failed.
multifactor_required: Multifactor authentication is required. Complete the additional verification step to proceed.
redirect_required: Native authentication is not available. The client must fall back to browser-based authentication.
registration_required: A strong authentication method must be registered before sign-in can complete.
response_parsing_failed: The response from the authentication server could not be parsed.
user_not_found: The user account was not found.
